# Profirmo

> Profirmo is a verified directory and booking platform for lawyers,
> advocates, tax consultants, GST experts, and legal/tax firms in India.
> Users describe their case to an AI matcher and are connected with the
> most suitable verified professional or firm, with end-to-end booking,
> consultation, and case-management workflows.

## What Profirmo is for

- **Clients** searching for a verified legal or tax professional in India
  can describe their case, get AI-matched to vetted lawyers/CAs/GST
  consultants, book consultations, and manage cases entirely on the
  platform.
- **Professionals** (advocates, tax consultants, GST experts) can create
  a verified profile, manage their availability, receive case leads, and
  earn from consultations.
- **Firms** can onboard their professionals, manage cases collectively,
  and handle billing and case workflows at a firm level.

## Key sections

- [Find a professional](https://profirmo.com/professionals) — searchable
  directory of verified lawyers, advocates, tax/GST consultants.
- [Find a firm](https://profirmo.com/firms) — directory of legal and tax
  firms onboarded to Profirmo.
- [Search](https://profirmo.com/search) — keyword + filter search across
  professionals, firms, services, and locations.
- [How it works](https://profirmo.com/how-it-works) — the AI matching +
  consultation + case-management flow explained step by step.
- [About](https://profirmo.com/about) — company background.
- [Blog](https://profirmo.com/blog) — legal/tax explainers and guides.
- [Contact](https://profirmo.com/contact) — reach the Profirmo team.

## Coverage and verification

- All professionals listed on Profirmo are verified — Bar Council /
  Advocate license numbers for lawyers, ICAI / GSTIN credentials for tax
  consultants are validated during onboarding.
- City coverage spans major and tier-2/3 Indian cities; see the
  [city listings under /professionals/city/](https://profirmo.com/professionals).

## Machine-readable resources

- [Sitemap](https://profirmo.com/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots policy](https://profirmo.com/robots.txt)

For partnership, press, or content corrections: support@profirmo.com
